title: Legacy Console Head Bug
description: This mod makes vertical head movement look inverted, like in the early days of console editions!
body:
This mod makes it so vertical head movement is inverted like in the early versions of Minecraft Legacy Edition.
Feel free to use it for your modpack!

_This does not affect camera movement and it's client side._

**RECOMMENDED TO USE WITH THE LEGACY4J MOD : **
https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j
